page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: computes the triplet distance between rooted trees in O(n log n) time and the quartet distance between unrooted trees in O(dn log n) time, where d degree of the tree with the smallest degree.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Computation of the triplet- and Quartet-distance between evolutionary trees.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Computation of the triplet- and Quartet-distance between evolutionary trees.
